transcript: Yeah, I was calling about the video game that you're selling.
Yeah, I wanted to buy it.
Actually, I wanted to trade something for it.
What do you do in the game?
Oh, it's just like... you're this little dude, and you have to go shoot all these aliens... and stuff, and this wizard dude...
You have to shoot a wizard dude?
It's bad. It's got joystick on it?
You bet. [exhale] You bet it does. Yeah, I wanted to trade something for it. I've got... putty?
Well... you're gonna have to talk to... someone else about the... money part.
Uh... yeah, I wanted to trade something for Wizard of Wor?
I wanted to trade... um... some like, putty?
I... don't know that I would have any use for putty. What kind of putty are you talking about?
Nah... uh... I don't think I'd really have any use for it.
A zebra. Nah... I'd have to clean up after him.
I would have to clean up after him. [laughs]
Um... how about like, something like bronze statuary, or hummels, or... any pottery, or...?
Well... that's really why I'm trying to sell this, is because I'm trying to... get--
I have some souvenir spoons, or... um... some, you know, rugs and stuff...
Uh... nah, I'm really trying to... eliminate some stuff around the house, that's why I... make more room, I don't... really need to fill it up with something else.
How about wrought iron? Or teak?
Uh... don't really need any of that, either.
Um... it's missing all four doors... and all the... all the wheels and tires. And windows.
Hmm... no, I don't think I'd have any use for that, then.
Could I come over and play it?
I mean, just for a quarter, each time?
